{
  "critical_issue": "Compiler command-line option error",
  "evidence": [
    "x86_64-conda-linux-gnu-c++: error: unrecognized debug output level 'encode=arch=compute_80,code=sm_80'",
    "x86_64-conda-linux-gnu-c++: error: unrecognized command-line option '--expt-relaxed-constexpr'"
  ],
  "root_cause": "Compiler does not recognize certain options, such as 'encode=arch=compute_80,code=sm_80' and '--expt-relaxed-constexpr'.",

  "must_hold_invariants": [],
  "minimal_fix": "Remove the unrecognized options from extra_cflags.",
